item.title: We Hunted Overpopulated Deer at Night
item.description: A night hunt targets overpopulated deer. What challenges—and unexpected moments—come with managing wildlife after dark?

media:content.media:title: We Hunted Overpopulated Deer at Night
media:content.media:description: A night hunt targets overpopulated deer. What challenges—and unexpected moments—come with managing wildlife after dark?

item.title: Going Overboard with Tannerite in the Backyard
item.description: A backyard experiment gets explosive with Tannerite. How far is too far when fun meets firepower?

media:content.media:title: Going Overboard with Tannerite in the Backyard
media:content.media:description: A backyard experiment gets explosive with Tannerite. How far is too far when fun meets firepower?

item.title: Tiny Creek Fishing! Twins Try Live Bait
item.description: The twins take on a tiny creek with live bait in hand. Will this simple setup reel in big surprises?

media:content.media:title: Tiny Creek Fishing! Twins Try Live Bait
media:content.media:description: The twins take on a tiny creek with live bait in hand. Will this simple setup reel in big surprises?

item.title: Is being a YouTuber actually a real career?
item.description: The debate is as lively as ever — is YouTube a legitimate career or just a hobby that got out of hand? Two sides, plenty of opinions, and no easy answer. Where do you stand on this one?

media:content.media:title: Is being a YouTuber actually a real career?
media:content.media:description: The debate is as lively as ever — is YouTube a legitimate career or just a hobby that got out of hand? Two sides, plenty of opinions, and no easy answer. Where do you stand on this one?

item.title: Identical twins take on a tannerite challenge
item.description: Twin versus twin in a tannerite challenge — with safety front and centre throughout. A fun and closely watched experiment that's as much about caution as it is competition. Which twin do you think came out on top?

media:content.media:title: Identical twins take on a tannerite challenge
media:content.media:description: Twin versus twin in a tannerite challenge — with safety front and centre throughout. A fun and closely watched experiment that's as much about caution as it is competition. Which twin do you think came out on top?

item.title: Someone Called the Game Warden on Us!
item.description: Just when the fun was rolling, the call came in. Who tipped off the game warden, and what happened next?

media:content.media:title: Someone Called the Game Warden on Us!
media:content.media:description: Just when the fun was rolling, the call came in. Who tipped off the game warden, and what happened next?

item.title: We Went Shark Fishing and Things Got Wild!
item.description: The ocean delivered more than we bargained for. What unexpected twists made this shark fishing trip one for the books?

media:content.media:title: We Went Shark Fishing and Things Got Wild!
media:content.media:description: The ocean delivered more than we bargained for. What unexpected twists made this shark fishing trip one for the books?
